name: Pets & Stuff
short_description: Pets & Stuff – a cute, fun and relaxing game where you become a skilful groomer and veterinarian using a variety of tools, meds and stylish accessories. Let your imagination run wild!
detailed_description:
Pets & Stuff — a cute, fun and relaxing game where you become a skilful groomer and veterinarian. Help little friends in trouble, make them happy, pampered, clean, well-fed, and don't forget to add a pinch of chic. Let your imagination run wild! Enjoy a fully responsive and polished gameplay, make the best trims, feel the fur at the end of your fingertips and capture the best photoshoots of your creations.

Cuteness overload and furrrr everywhere guaranteed!

KEY FEATURES:

  • There are so many lovely animals here! Cats, dogs, raccoons, foxes, deer, and so many more.

  • A variety of products and tools available to treat and care for your little friends.

  • A wide range of cool accessories for the most stylish pets of all.

  • Multiple locations, with the ability to upgrade your clinic into the best of the best.
